verses.text: Come near to God and he will come near to you. Wash your hands, you sinners, and purify your hearts, you double-minded.

phrases.t: and he will come near to you.

lessons.god: God draws near to everyone who draws near to Him
lessons.good: Coming near to God and purifying our hearts brings us into close relationship with Him
lessons.bad: Double-mindedness and unclean hands create distance between us and God

verses.text: But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, God’s special possession, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light.

phrases.t: But you are a chosen people,
a royal priesthood, a holy nation,
that you may declare the praises

lessons.god: God has chosen us and called us out of darkness into His wonderful light
lessons.good: We are a royal priesthood and holy nation — chosen to declare God's praises
lessons.bad: Living in spiritual darkness when God has called us into light wastes our royal identity

verses.text: “He himself bore our sins” in his body on the cross, so that we might die to sins and live for righteousness; “by his wounds you have been healed.”

phrases.t: in his body on the cross,
so that we might die to sins

lessons.god: Jesus bore our sins in His own body on the cross so we could be healed
lessons.good: Christ's sacrifice enables us to die to sin and live for righteousness
lessons.bad: Continuing to live in sin after Christ bore it on the cross wastes His painful sacrifice

verses.text: But in your hearts revere Christ as Lord. Always be prepared to give an answer to everyone who asks you to give the reason for the hope that you have. But do this with gentleness and respect,

phrases.t: But in your hearts revere Christ as Lord.
Always be prepared to give an answer
to give the reason for the hope
But do this with gentleness and respect,

lessons.god: Christ is Lord and deserves to be reverently honored in our hearts above all else
lessons.good: Being prepared to explain our hope with gentleness and respect honors God
lessons.bad: Being unable to explain why we have hope means we have not thought deeply about our faith

verses.text: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.

lessons.god: God cares for us so deeply that He wants us to cast every anxiety onto Him
lessons.good: Casting all our anxieties on God brings relief because He truly cares for us
lessons.bad: Carrying anxiety instead of giving it to God burdens us with weight He wants to bear

verses.text: Be alert and of sober mind. Your enemy the devil prowls around like a roaring lion looking for someone to devour.

phrases.t: Be alert and of sober mind.
prowls around like a roaring lion

lessons.god: God warns us about the devil's attacks so we can be prepared and alert
lessons.good: Being alert and sober-minded protects us from the enemy's attacks
lessons.bad: The devil prowls like a roaring lion seeking to devour those who are not watchful

verses.text: His divine power has given us everything we need for a godly life through our knowledge of him who called us by his own glory and goodness.

phrases.t: His divine power has given us
who called us by his own glory

lessons.god: God's divine power has already given us everything we need for a godly life
lessons.good: Through knowing God, we have access to everything needed for life and godliness
lessons.bad: Claiming we lack what we need for godly living ignores what God has already provided

verses.text: The Lord is not slow in keeping his promise, as some understand slowness. Instead he is patient with you, not wanting anyone to perish, but everyone to come to repentance.

phrases.t: Instead he is patient with you,
but everyone to come to repentance.

lessons.god: The Lord is patient, not wanting anyone to perish but everyone to come to repentance
lessons.good: God's patience gives everyone time and opportunity to repent and be saved
lessons.bad: Perishing because we delayed repentance wastes the patience God extended to us

verses.text: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins and purify us from all unrighteousness.

phrases.t: and will forgive us our sins

lessons.god: God is faithful and just — He will always forgive and purify us when we confess our sins
lessons.good: Confessing our sins leads to complete forgiveness and purification from all unrighteousness
lessons.bad: Hiding our sins instead of confessing them blocks God's cleansing work in our lives

verses.text: See what great love the Father has lavished on us, that we should be called children of God! And that is what we are!

phrases.t: See what great love the Father
And that is what we are!

lessons.god: The Father has lavished such great love on us that He calls us His own children
lessons.good: Being called children of God is our true identity — and that is what we really are
lessons.bad: Failing to see ourselves as God's beloved children robs us of the identity He gave us

verses.text: You, dear children, are from God and have overcome them, because the one who is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.

phrases.t: You, dear children, are from God
because the one who is in you
the one who is in the world.

lessons.god: God who lives in us is greater than any spiritual force in the world
lessons.good: We have already overcome because the one in us is greater than the one in the world
lessons.bad: The spirit of the world is real and powerful, but it is no match for God within us

verses.text: Dear friends, let us love one another, for love comes from God. Everyone who loves has been born of God and knows God.

phrases.t: Dear friends, let us love one another,

lessons.god: God is the source of all genuine love — everyone who loves has been born of God
lessons.good: Loving one another is proof that we know God and have been born of Him
lessons.bad: A loveless life reveals that someone has not truly experienced God's transforming love

verses.text: Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love.

lessons.god: God's very nature is love — love is not just something He does, it is who He is
lessons.good: Knowing that God is love gives us confidence in His character and actions
lessons.bad: Not loving others reveals that we do not truly know the God who is love

verses.text: There is no fear in love. But perfect love drives out fear, because fear has to do with punishment. The one who fears is not made perfect in love.

phrases.t: There is no fear in love.
But perfect love drives out fear,
is not made perfect in love.

lessons.god: God's perfect love is so powerful that it completely drives out fear
lessons.good: Growing in God's perfect love frees us from the torment of fear
lessons.bad: Fear is connected to punishment and reveals that love has not been perfected in us

verses.text: We love because he first loved us.

lessons.god: God loved us first — His love is the origin and motivation for all our love
lessons.good: Our ability to love comes from first being loved by God
lessons.bad: Trying to love without first receiving God's love leaves us running on empty

verses.text: This is the confidence we have in approaching God: that if we ask anything according to his will, he hears us.

phrases.t: This is the confidence we have

lessons.god: God hears us whenever we ask anything according to His will
lessons.good: Approaching God with confidence and praying according to His will guarantees He hears us
lessons.bad: Praying without regard for God's will may mean asking for things that would harm us

verses.text: Here I am! I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, I will come in and eat with that person, and they with me.

phrases.t: I stand at the door and knock.

lessons.god: Jesus stands at the door of our hearts and personally knocks, seeking fellowship with us
lessons.good: Opening the door to Jesus leads to intimate fellowship and communion with Him
lessons.bad: Ignoring Jesus' knock and keeping the door closed shuts out the best relationship possible

verses.text: ‘He will wipe every tear from their eyes. There will be no more death’ or mourning or crying or pain, for the old order of things has passed away.

phrases.t: There will be no more death’
or mourning or crying or pain,
for the old order of things

lessons.god: God promises to personally wipe every tear and end all death, mourning, crying, and pain
lessons.good: A day is coming when suffering will end and God will make everything new
lessons.bad: Death, mourning, crying, and pain belong to the old order that is passing away

verses.text: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.

phrases.t: I am the Alpha and the Omega,

lessons.god: Jesus is the Alpha and Omega — the eternal beginning and end of all things
lessons.good: Knowing Jesus is the First and Last gives us confidence that He holds all of history
lessons.bad: A life without the Alpha and Omega has no real beginning, purpose, or meaningful end
